nodes.label: Addition
nodes.description: Combining numbers to find the total (sum)

nodes.label: Basic Addition
nodes.description: Adding without carrying, column by column

nodes.label: With Carrying
nodes.description: When a column adds up to 10 or more, carry to the next

nodes.label: Steps to Add
nodes.description: Line up numbers, add right to left, carry if needed

nodes.label: Subtraction
nodes.description: Taking away a number to find the difference

nodes.label: Basic Subtraction
nodes.description: Subtracting without borrowing, column by column

nodes.label: With Borrowing
nodes.description: When the top digit is smaller, borrow from the next column

nodes.label: Steps to Subtract
nodes.description: Line up numbers, subtract right to left, borrow if needed

nodes.label: Word Problems
nodes.description: Using addition and subtraction to solve real-life questions

nodes.label: Clue Words
nodes.description: Words like 'total', 'more', 'left', 'remaining' tell you which operation to use

nodes.label: Solving Steps
nodes.description: Read carefully, find clue words, set up the problem, solve, and check

nodes.label: Checking Answers
nodes.description: Use the opposite operation or estimation to verify

nodes.label: Inverse Check
nodes.description: Check addition with subtraction and subtraction with addition

nodes.label: Estimation Check
nodes.description: Round numbers and see if your answer is close to the estimate
